CustomField.description: Per-LWC-mount UUID supplied by the client that initiated this write. Subscribers compare against their own mount nonce to drop self-echoes (multi-tab same-user safe). Empty when the write didn't originate from a gantt LWC.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Per-mount client UUID for self-echo filtering. Empty for non-gantt-originated writes.
CustomField.label: Client Nonce
